qualifications.name: LLB
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Similar programmes: BAccLLB; BA Law; BCom Law.

Career opportunities: Legal practitioner; Attorney; Advocate; Judge; Public Prosecutor; Deeds Office examiner or registrar; Master of the High Court clerk or registrar; Legal advisor; Compliance manager; Mediator; Arbitrator; Public Protector; Academic lecturer; NGO work; Entrepreneur; Business manager; Journalist; National or provincial government.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Write the NBTs AQL before 31 July; Aggregate of at least 70% in the NSC or IEB school-leaving certificate, excluding Life Orientation.

one_of.subject: English Home Language or English First Additional Language
Afrikaans Home Language or Afrikaans First Additional Language

qualifications.name: LLB (Option 2)
notes: Aggregate note: Only available as a second bachelor's degree; selection is based on prior bachelor’s degree performance.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Any bachelor's degree from a South African university; Aggregate of at least 60% in the final year.

qualifications.name: BA Law
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Similar programmes: LLB; BAccLLB; BCom Law.

Career opportunities: Entry route into the two-year LLB degree; Legal practitioner pathway after completing LLB; Attorney pathway after completing LLB; Advocate pathway after completing LLB; Careers requiring understanding of languages, human behaviour and social issues.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Write the NBTs AQL before 31 July; Aggregate of at least 70% in the NSC or IEB school-leaving certificate, excluding Life Orientation.

one_of.subject: English Home Language or English First Additional Language
Afrikaans Home Language or Afrikaans First Additional Language

qualifications.name: BCom Law
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Similar programmes: LLB; BAccLLB; BA Law.

Career opportunities: Business world; Commercial law; Entry route into the two-year LLB degree; Legal practitioner pathway after completing LLB; Attorney pathway after completing LLB; Advocate pathway after completing LLB.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Write the NBTs AQL and MAT before 31 July; Aggregate of at least 70% in the NSC or IEB school-leaving certificate, excluding Life Orientation.

qualifications.name: BAccLLB
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Similar programmes: LLB; BCom Law; BA Law.
Career opportunities: Law; Accounting; Legal profession after practical training and prescribed examinations; Chartered accountant pathway through Honours or Postgraduate Diploma in Accounting.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Write the NBTs AQL and MAT before 31 July; Aggregate of at least 80% in the NSC or IEB school-leaving certificate, excluding Life Orientation; Mathematics: 70% OR Mathematics: 60% AND Accounting: 70%.
